data.title: China’s rare-earth shipments to the US slip while overall exports increase
data.description:
China’s exports of rare earths to the United States slipped in August despite the country’s overall magnet shipments continuing to recover after Beijing eased export curbs earlier this year. Customs figures released Saturday show that exports of rare earths to the US fell 5% from July to 590 tons. Total overseas shipments rose to about […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-rare-earth-shipments-to-us-slip/

data.title: Analyst Reports ASTER Short Position Increase to $270,000
data.description: According to BlockBeats, blockchain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa) has observed a significant increase in ASTER short positions by 'Maji' over the past two hours. The position has grown to $270,000, equivalent to 225,000 units, with an average opening price of $1.1376 per unit. Currently, the position is experiencing an unrealized loss of $14,400.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Sees Growth with USDT Market Share Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama indicates that the total market capitalization of stablecoins globally has reached $292.623 billion, marking a 1.37% increase over the past week. Notably, the market share of USDT has decreased to 58.79%.

In the same period, USDE experienced a 5.57% increase in issuance, while USDC saw a 1.59% rise. These changes reflect ongoing dynamics within the stablecoin sector.

data.title: The whale/institution that purchased ASTER for 7.5 million USDT is suspected of hedging its short position on Hyperliquid.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the whale/institution that purchased ASTER for 7.5 million USDT was not a naked long ASTER. An associated wallet of this address performed hedging or funding fee arbitrage operations on Hyperliquid: it shorted 6.486 million ASTER with 3x leverage (the same amount as the spot purchase). This should be a hedging or arbitrage of funding fees (the current fee rate on Hyperliquid is positive, that is, longs pay shorts for funding fees, and the annualized fee rate is as high as 450%).

data.title: Binance: Eligible users can claim 800 FROGGIE tokens airdrop
data.description: Froggie (FROGGIE) is now available on Binance Alpha. Eligible Binance users can claim an 800 FROGGIE token airdrop using 200 Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page. The point threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until all rewards are distributed. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.

data.title: Analysis: Hong Kong's digital currency sector is making various attempts beyond stablecoins, potentially forming a "competitive and cooperative landscape"
data.description: Caijing magazine published an article titled "Hong Kong's Digital Asset Market: Stablecoins, RWAs, and Digital RMB: Multiple Competition and Cooperation." The article noted that in addition to stablecoins, Hong Kong is also conducting various digital currency experiments, including the Digital Currency Bridge project jointly led by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority and other central banks, and tokenized deposits issued by banks. Many market participants believe this may form a "competitive cooperation" pattern to a certain extent. In an interview, Chiu Tak-kan, a member of the Legislative Council of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, stated that Hong Kong regulators provide clear oversight and tracking procedures, allowing people to understand the issuance volume of stablecoins and the status of users' bank accounts. Commodities are also seen as a key application scenario for stablecoins.

data.title: A whale used 7.5 million USDT to purchase 6.486 million ASTER in the past 4 hours.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale has used 7.5 million USDT to purchase 6.486 million ASTER tokens over the past four hours, at an average price of $1.15. Through withdrawals from Binance and loans from Aave, the whale raised 7.5 million USDT over the past four hours, transferring it to Aster to buy ASTER tokens and then withdrawing it back to their on-chain wallet.

data.title: Why Morgan Stanley’s revised 60/20/20 portfolio is a wake-up call for investors
data.description:
Morgan Stanley’s Chief Investment Officer, Mike Wilson, has upended conventional wisdom surrounding the classic 60/40 portfolio, advocating instead for a 60/20/20 mix. Gold now joins bonds as a direct allocation for investors seeking resilience in a time of inflation and market volatility.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/why-morgan-stanleys-revised-60-20-20-portfolio-is-a-wake-up-call-for-investors/
